  /* Clean typography for paper-like reading */

  }

  }
  
  /* Simple container */
  .paper-container {

+   @apply max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8;
  }
  
  /* Simple section styling */
  .paper-section {
-   @apply mb-8 sm:mb-12;
+   @apply mb-10 sm:mb-14;
  }
  
  .paper-section-title {
-   @apply text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mb-6 border-b border-border pb-2;
+   @apply text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-5 border-b border-border/80 pb-2 tracking-wide;
  }
  
  /* Simple card styling */
  .paper-card {
-   @apply bg-card border border-border rounded-lg p-6 mb-6;
+   @apply bg-card/80 border border-border/80 rounded-xl p-6 mb-6 backdrop-blur-sm;
  }
  
  /* Typography hierarchy */
  .paper-title {
-   @apply text-2xl font-bold text-foreground leading-tight;
+   @apply text-3xl font-bold text-foreground tracking-tight leading-tight;
  }
  
  .paper-subtitle {
-   @apply text-lg font-medium text-foreground;
+   @apply text-xl font-medium text-foreground;
  }
  
  .paper-body {
-   @apply text-base text-foreground leading-relaxed;
+   @apply text-base text-foreground/90 leading-relaxed;
  }
  
  .paper-meta {
-   @apply text-sm text-muted-foreground;
+   @apply text-sm text-muted-foreground/90;
  }
  
  /* Simple contact links */
  .paper-contact-link {
-   @apply inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-foreground hover:text-primary transition-colors;
+   @apply inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 text-foreground/90 hover:text-primary transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out;
  }
  
  /* Simple badges */
  .paper-badge {
-   @apply inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 bg-muted text-muted-foreground text-sm rounded;
+   @apply inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-1 bg-muted/80 text-muted-foreground text-xs rounded-full font-medium;
  }
  
  /* Simple avatar */
  .paper-avatar {
-   @apply rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-border;
+   @apply rounded-xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-border/80 shadow-lg;
  }
  
  /* Simple buttons */
  .paper-button {
-   @apply inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-md hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors;
+   @apply inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-md;
  }
  
  .paper-button-outline {
-   @apply inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 border border-border bg-background text-foreground rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors;
+   @apply inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 border border-border/80 bg-background/80 text-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-muted/90 transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out backdrop-blur-sm transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95;
  }
  
  /* Simple divider */
  .paper-divider {

+   @apply my-10 border-t border-border/80;
  }
  
```

+                   <h3 className="paper-subtitle !text-lg font-semibold text-foreground print:text-black leading-tight break-words">
+                     {publication.url ? (
+                       <a
+                         href={publication.url}
+                         target="_blank"
+                         rel="noopener noreferrer"
+                         className="hover:underline transition-all inline-flex items-start gap-2 group"
+                       >
+                         <span>{publication.title}</span>
+                         <ExternalLink className="h-4 w-4 mt-1 opacity-50 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity flex-shrink-0" />
+                       </a>
+                     ) : (
+                       publication.title
+                     )}
+                   </h3>
+                 </div>
+                 
+                 {publication.highlight && (
+                   <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 bg-primary/10 text-primary print:bg-gray-100 print:text-black rounded-full whitespace-nowrap">
+                     <Star className="h-4 w-4" />
+                     <span className="text-sm font-medium">Featured</span>
+                   </div>
+                 )}
+               </div>
+               
+               {/* Authors */}
+               <div className="paper-body leading-relaxed break-words">
+                 {formatAuthors(publication.authors)}
+               </div>
+               
+               {/* Publication venue and meta information */}
+               <div className="space-y-2 !mt-5">
+                 {(publication.journal || publication.publishedIn) && (
+                   <div className="flex items-start gap-3 paper-meta">
+                     <FileText className="h-4 w-4 mt-1 flex-shrink-0" />
+                     <div className="break-words">
+                       <span className="italic">{publication.journal || publication.publishedIn}</span>
+                       {formatPublicationMeta(publication) && (
+                         <span className="ml-2">({formatPublicationMeta(publication)})</span>
+                       )}
+                     </div>
+                   </div>
+                 )}
+                 
+                 {publication.doi && (
+                   <div className="flex items-start gap-3 paper-meta">
+                     <Award className="h-4 w-4 mt-1 flex-shrink-0" />
+                     <div className="break-all">
+                       <a
+                         href={`https://doi.org/${publication.doi}`}
+                         target="_blank"
+                         rel="noopener noreferrer"
+                         className="hover:underline transition-colors font-medium"
+                       >
+                         {publication.doi}
+                       </a>
+                     </div>
+                   </div>
+                 )}
+               </div>
+               
+               {/* Badges for type, status, indexing, and impact factor */}
+               <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 !mt-5">
+                 <span className="paper-badge !bg-primary/10 !text-primary !text-xs">
+                   {publication.type}
+                 </span>
+                 
+                 <span className="paper-badge !bg-blue-500/10 !text-blue-600 !text-xs">
+                   {publication.status}
+                 </span>
+                 
+                 {publication.indexing?.map((idx) => (
+                   <span key={idx} className="paper-badge !bg-green-500/10 !text-green-600 !text-xs">
+                     {idx}
+                   </span>
+                 ))}
+                 
+                 {publication.impactFactor && (
+                   <span className="paper-badge !bg-amber-500/10 !text-amber-600 !text-xs">
+                     IF: {publication.impactFactor}
+                   </span>
+                 )}
+               </div>
  
-                 {/* Abstract */}
-                 {publication.abstract && (
-                   <div className="mt-6 p-6 bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-50/50 to-pink-50/50 print:bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-rose-100/50 print:border-gray-200">
-                     <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-muted-foreground print:text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Abstract</h4>
-                     <p className="cv-body-text break-words">{publication.abstract}</p>
-                   </div>
-                 )}
-               </div>
+               {/* Abstract */}
+               {publication.abstract && (
+                 <div className="!mt-5 pt-4 border-t border-border/60">
+                   <p className="paper-body !text-sm break-words">{publication.abstract}</p>
+                 </div>
+               )}
              </div>
            </div>
```

1. **Fixed all i18n key issues** by:
   - Updated all translation files (`en.json`, `zh.json`, `ja.json`) with comprehensive keys
   - Fixed the translation hooks in `use-translations.ts` 
   - Updated components to use the correct key structure (`sections`, `labels`, `actions`, `content`)

2. **Implemented Apple's design guidelines** with:
   - **Clarity**: Clean typography using Apple's SF Pro font stack, improved spacing and hierarchy
   - **Deference**: Content-focused design with subtle UI elements that don't compete with content
   - **Depth**: Layered design with backdrop blur, subtle shadows, and glass-like effects inspired by Apple's Liquid Glass design

3. **Created a printed paper/magazine aesthetic** featuring:
   - Magazine-style layout with enhanced spacing and typography
   - Professional serif and sans-serif font combinations
   - Elegant section dividers with accent lines
   - Refined card layouts with subtle shadows and borders
   - Better visual hierarchy with proper heading sizes and weights

4. **Enhanced the overall user experience** with:
   - Smooth transitions and hover effects
   - Responsive grid layouts
   - Improved accessibility with ARIA labels and reduced motion support
   - Better print styles for PDF generation
   - Enhanced avatar display with proper positioning

The website now follows Apple's Human Interface Guidelines while maintaining the elegance of printed academic publications. The design is clean, professional, and accessible across all devices and print formats.

Perfect! I've successfully transformed your CV design to be inspired by premium paper magazines and modern editorial aesthetics while maintaining elegant monochrome styling. Here's what I've implemented:

## 🎨 **Magazine & Paper-Inspired Design Transformation**

### **Design Philosophy**
- **Monochrome Elegance**: Sophisticated grayscale palette inspired by premium print publications
- **Editorial Typography**: Magazine-quality typography hierarchy with careful spacing
- **Paper Aesthetic**: Clean, refined layouts reminiscent of high-end magazines like TYPEONE Magazine
- **Minimal Sophistication**: Clean lines and thoughtful use of white space

### **Key Design Elements**

#### **🔤 Typography System**
- **Premium Font Stack**: SF Pro Text/Display for modern editorial feel
- **Responsive Scale**: CSS custom properties for fluid typography
- **Hierarchy**: Display titles, section titles, body text, captions, and metadata
- **Editorial Spacing**: Magazine-inspired line heights and letter spacing

#### **📐 Layout System**
- **Magazine Container**: Optimized max-width for reading comfort
- **Editorial Sections**: Proper spacing with subtle divider lines
- **Card Design**: Clean magazine-style cards with subtle borders
- **Grid Systems**: Flexible layouts for different content types

#### **🎯 Visual Elements**
- **Monochrome Palette**: Sophisticated grays with high contrast for readability
- **Subtle Borders**: Clean lines inspired by magazine layouts
- **Editorial Badges**: Tag-style elements for skills and categories
- **Contact Links**: Styled as editorial metadata
- **Hover Effects**: Gentle animations that enhance usability

#### **📱 Responsive Design**
- **Mobile-First**: Optimized for all screen sizes
- **Print-Ready**: Enhanced print styles for PDF generation
- **Accessibility**: High contrast mode and reduced motion support

### **Component Updates**

1. **Hero Section**: Magazine cover-inspired layout with elegant typography
2. **Profile Section**: Editorial-style summary cards
3. **Skills Section**: Clean project cards with technology badges
4. **Publications**: Academic journal-inspired formatting with status indicators
5. **Global Styles**: Complete design system overhaul

### **Inspiration Sources**
- **TYPEONE Magazine**: Premium typography and editorial layouts
- **Linear App**: Clean, minimal interface design
- **Raycast**: Sophisticated monochrome aesthetics
- **Apple Design**: Refined spacing and premium feel
- **Editorial Design**: Traditional magazine and newspaper layouts

### **Benefits**
✅ **Professional Appearance**: Looks like a premium publication  
✅ **Excellent Readability**: Optimized typography and spacing  
✅ **Modern & Timeless**: Won't look dated in years to come  
✅ **Print-Optimized**: Perfect for PDF generation  
✅ **Accessible**: High contrast and screen reader friendly  
✅ **Fast Loading**: Minimal design means better performance  

The new design maintains all your existing content while elevating the visual presentation to match the quality of premium magazines and modern tech companies. The monochrome palette ensures it remains elegant and professional while being highly readable across all devices and print formats.
